html:
Youths! Webb observed galaxy cluster El Gordo, a cosmic teen that existed 6.2 billion years after the big bang. The most massive cluster of its era, it’s a perfect gravitational magnifying glass, bending & distorting light from distant objects behind it: https://t.co/BrYH55h77F https://t.co/JK4XFxdUQX

— Venuugopal (@vpotti) September 18, 2025
